programme.title: FIFA World Cup 2026
programme.desc: The first FIFA World Cup Group H match between Spain and Cabo Verde takes place at Atlanta Stadium. Cabo Verde makes a historic debut by participating in the FIFA World Cup for the first time. Their first game is against the 2024 UEFA Euro champions.

programme.title: FIFA World Cup 2026
programme.desc: Portugal play Congo DR in the Group K opener at Houston Stadium. Cristiano Ronaldo makes a historic sixth World Cup appearance after scoring in five qualifiers to set a historic scoring record. Congo DR advanced after beating Jamaica.

programme.title: FIFA World Cup 2026
programme.desc: England take on Croatia in the Group L opener at Dallas Stadium in the 2026 FIFA World Cup. Harry Kane arrives in peak form after scoring 61 goals for Bayern Munich, while midfielder Luka Modric enters his fifth career World Cup tournament.

programme.title: FIFA World Cup 2026
programme.desc: Argentina plays Egypt in a Round of 16 match of the FIFA World Cup at Atlanta Stadium. Argentina beat Cabo Verde 3-2 behind Lionel Messi's 20th World Cup goal, while Egypt defeated Australia 4-2 on penalties, sealed by Hossam Abdelmaguid.

programme.title: FIFA World Cup 2026
programme.desc: Norway and England meet in the FIFA World Cup Quarterfinals at Miami Stadium. Norway beat Brazil 2-1 behind Erling Haaland's late brace, while England defeated Mexico 3-2 behind Jude Bellingham's brace and Harry Kane's clutch penalty sealed the win.

programme.title: FIFA World Cup 2026
programme.desc: France plays England in a Bronze Final match of the FIFA World Cup at Miami Stadium. France play the Bronze Final game after losing 0-2 to Spain in the semi-finals. Anthony Gordon scored the opening goal in England's 1-2 loss to Argentina.

programme.title: FIFA World Cup 2026
programme.desc: Argentina plays Spain in the Final match of the FIFA World Cup at New York New Jersey Stadium. Spain secured a 2-0 shutout over France to advance to the finals. Lionel Messi assisted the winning goal in Argentina's 2-1 victory over England.

programme.title: NASCAR Craftsman Truck Series
programme.desc: The 2026 FaithFest 250 of the NASCAR Craftsman Truck Series begins at North Wilkesboro Speedway. Cup star Chase Elliott is officially locked in for double-duty along with Tanner Gray in a 250-lap showdown.

programme.title: IndyCar Racing
programme.desc: The 2026 Borchetta Bourbon Music City Grand Prix gets underway at Nashville Superspeedway. Alex Palou defends a 56-point edge over Kyle Kirkwood, with Christian Lundgaard also in the hunt over 225 laps on the 1.33-mile oval.

programme.title: FIFA World Cup 2026
programme.desc: Brazil and Japan meet in a Round of 32 game of the FIFA World Cup at Houston Stadium. Brazil ranked first after winning against Scotland 3-0 in the final Group C matchup. Japan ranked second in Group F after a 1-1 draw against Sweden.

programme.title: FIFA World Cup 2026
programme.desc: Germany faces Paraguay in a Round of 32 match of the FIFA World Cup at Boston Stadium. Germany finished first but lost to Ecuador 1-2 in their final Group E match. Paraguay finished third after a 0-0 draw against Australia in Group D.

programme.title: FIFA World Cup 2026
programme.desc: England faces Congo DR in a Round of 32 match of the FIFA World Cup at Atlanta Stadium. Congo DR ranked third in Group K after beating Uzbekistan 3-1. England ranked first after claiming a 2-0 victory over Panama in their final Group L match.

programme.title: FIFA World Cup 2026
programme.desc: The United States and Paraguay compete in the first match of Group D in the FIFA World Cup. Weston McKennie leads the United States squad while Paraguay features midfielder Diego Gomez. The United States plays at home in Los Angeles.

programme.title: FIFA World Cup 2026
programme.desc: USA meets Bosnia and Herzegovina in a Round of 32 game of the FIFA World Cup in San Francisco. USA finished first despite a 2-3 loss to Türkiye in the final Group D match. Bosnia and Herzegovina ranked third in Group B after a 3-1 win over Qatar.

The 118 fights an apartment building blaze and attempts a daring rescue of a blind woman trapped inside; Athena discovers a potentially sinister crime; Hen performs a risky medical procedure after an accident at a televised cooking show.

The 118 races to rescue a little girl in a runaway hot air balloon and help with a city power outage caused by a hijacked tree-trimmer truck; Athena's investigation into the serial rapist case puts her life in jeopardy.
The 118 rush to save lives in the aftermath of a massive train derailment.

When the Hollywood Reservoir dam breaks, Bobby and the 118 race into action to save passengers on a city bus that has crashed into a building several stories in the air; the team adjusts to life as first responders during the pandemic.

In the aftermath of the dam break, massive mudslides wreak havoc throughout Los Angeles; Athena fights to save herself and an agoraphobic woman after her house collapses; a group of pregnant women trapped in a submerged house.

The team races to save a man under siege by his high-tech smart home; a yoga teacher loses her vision; Athena hunts down a bank robber disguised by COVID-19 protocols; members of the 118's crew prepare for an out-of-state mission.

Athena investigates a mysterious murder during a neighborhood block party; the 118 rush to save lives endangered by a bomb threat; Chimney has a hard time keeping secrets when Maddie and Buck's parents come to town.
The 118 races to save the lives of workers trapped in a factory fire; Maddie reveals a painful family secret that causes Buck to confront his childhood and answer why he is the daredevil he is today.

The 118 has a day from hell with a never-ending series of bizarre emergency calls; a man tapes himself to a freeway billboard; a restaurant manager destroys his own business; Eddie feels a spark with Christopher's former teacher.

A man gets pinned under a Humvee; a garage band rocks out too hard; Michael notices strange behavior at a nearby apartment; Hen's mother unexpectedly arrives and announces she is moving to Los Angeles.
The 118 are called to the tarmac when a flight attendant reaches her limit with her flight's passengers; Eddie worries Christopher will not accept him dating; Buck reconnects with an old flame.

Athena and the 118 race to save lives after a drunken driver causes a deadly pileup on the freeway; Maddie goes into labor; Hen and Karen are devastated as they prepare their foster daughter to be reunited with her birth mother.

The 118 responds to calls dealing with parents and their children, including a disastrous birthday party thrown by a mommy blogger; Athena and Michael talk to May about her past suicide attempt; Chimney and Maddie adjust to life with their newborn.

The members of the 118 rush to the site of a hit-and-run that leaves a familiar face in critical condition; with Buck's help, Athena investigates the case of a missing woman; Josh recalls an emergency in 2006 that led him to become a first responder.
When a famous mystery writer dies, Athena, Bobby and the 118 respond to the chaos caused by a citywide manhunt for buried treasure the author left behind.

The members of the 118 make calls to save a bridezilla at a disastrous wedding; Hen plays medical detective when her mother falls ill; Eddie and Christopher receive a visit from Carla; Athena uncovers a secret Bobby has been hiding.
Athena and the 118 are on high alert when a sniper is targeting members of the LAFD; Maddie makes a life decision.
